query:
insert or replace into UsableNonLeafRequirements (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                id
            )
            select
                ur.last_collect_nr,
                ur.product_id,
                ur.id
            from UsableRequirements ur, RequirementDescendants rd
            where ur.last_collect_nr = $1 and ur.product_id = $2
            and rd.last_collect_nr = $1 and rd.product_id = $2
            and ur.id = rd.id
